title: Scouts from the South
description: Reports have come in of strange, savage warriors spotted south of the mountain range. These Tenger scouts are likely the vanguard of a larger force. The local garrison needs someone to track down these scouts and learn what they can about the Tenger's intentions - whether they come seeking war or something else.

objectives.description: Track the Tenger scouts in the southern foothills
Observe the scouts or engage them
Gather intelligence about the Tenger horde
